description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🔄 Content updated (published July 10, 2026)

Hanno City Cleanliness Center (Clean Center) is holding a summer vacation parent-child facility tour.

Who can attend: Elementary school students living in Hanno and their guardians (preschool children may accompany)

Date and time:
• Thursday, July 23, 10:00 a.m.–11:30 a.m. (Registration closed)
• Wednesday, July 29, 10:00 a.m.–11:30 a.m. (Registration open) [Additional session]

Location: Hanno City Cleanliness Center, 768-1 Shimohata (parking available)

What to expect: Behind-the-scenes facility tour and craft workshop using cooling packs

Capacity: About 15 groups (first come, first served)

How to apply: Thursday, July 9 through Wednesday, July 22 at noon. Register by phone or email (clean@city.hanno.lg.jp). Please provide:
• Names of child and guardian
• Child's school name and grade
• Contact information

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/cleancenter/13174.html
summary: ℹ️ Summer vacation parent-child facility tour
